title: correa × rubra var. turnbullii
intro: Correa × rubra var. turnbullii is a hybrid plant species of the Correa genus, commonly known as the 'Turnbull's Correa' or 'Fuchsia Flower'. Native to Australia, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory qualities. The extracts from the plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, providing benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relief from coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Correa × rubra var. turnbullii include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the intended application.
